title: Death Recap
description: See where you died, track lost items, and find your way back with a recovery compass. Client-side — works on any server.
body:
# Death Recap

  Never lose your items again. When you die, Death Recap shows you exactly where it happened and guides you back.

  ## Features

  ### Death Screen Overlay
  When you die, an info panel appears showing:
  - **Exact coordinates** (X, Y, Z)
  - **Dimension** (Overworld / Nether / End)
  - **Biome**
  - **Items you had** at the time of death

  ### Recovery Compass HUD
  After respawning, a compact HUD appears at the top of your screen:
  - **Directional arrow** pointing toward your death location
  - **Distance** in blocks
  - **Despawn countdown timer** (5:00 → 0:00)
  - Auto-dismisses when you arrive within 5 blocks

  ### Death History Log
  Press **H** to open a full history of your past deaths:
  - Scrollable list of up to 50 deaths per world
  - Shows cause, coordinates, dimension, biome, and time
  - Click any entry and set it as a compass waypoint
  - Saved between sessions

  ## Controls

  | Key | Action |
  |-----|--------|
  | **H** | Open Death History |
  | **X** | Dismiss Recovery Compass |

  Both keys are rebindable in Controls → Miscellaneous.

  ## Configuration

  All features can be toggled individually in `config/deathrecap.json`:
  - Death screen overlay (coordinates, dimension, biome, inventory preview)
  - Recovery compass (despawn timer, distance, auto-hide distance)
  - Max history entries

  ## Why Death Recap?

  - **Client-side only** — install it and join any server, no server setup needed
  - **Lightweight** — no custom blocks, items, or entities
  - **Modpack-friendly** — works alongside grave mods, minimaps, and other utility mods
  - **Zero configuration** — works out of the box
